violations.description: Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitizer solution for three compartment sink was not maintained at the proper concentration. Observed dish machine at 0 ppm Chlorine at the beginning of inspection. This was corrected by the end of inspection.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. Observed the 3 comp sink leaking at time of inspection.
Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with waste receptacle as needed. Observed no trash can for the hand sink by the coffee maker.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not stored in a manner to protect against contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items. -Open chemical bottle on the top shelf above where customers to go orders are placed.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
